news.t: This income-investing approach from Goldman Sachs has been paying off
This ETF strategy could help risk-averse investors ride out wild market swings

holdings.infoBox: QQA is an equity ETF with a total of 121 individual holdings. The top holdings are Invesco Premier U.S. Government Money Portfolio stock at 16.35%, NVIDIA at 5.89%, Apple at 5.03%, Micron Technology at 4.70%, and Microsoft at 3.26%.

overview.description: The Invesco QQQ Income Advantage ETF (QQA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed, fund-of-funds, that utilizes equity securities and ETFs to mirror the NASDAQ-100 Index. The fund also employs an options-based income strategy with equity-linked notes (ELNs) for upside participation and downside protection QQA was launched on Jul 17, 2024 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: This income-investing approach from Goldman Sachs has been paying off
data.text: The firm's covered-call ETFs have been outperforming competitors.

data.title: This ETF strategy could help risk-averse investors ride out wild market swings
data.text: Invesco senior portfolio manager John Burrello sees income funds that employ options-based strategies as a suitable approach.
